svg.title: Model-agnostic spectrum across the open-harness-atlas registry
svg.desc: A horizontal bar chart where each open-source harness in the registry is plotted at its model-agnostic score from 0 (provider-locked) to 5 (fully portable). Colour encodes category.
svg.text: Per-entry score 0 (provider-locked) → 5 (fully portable). Auto-generated from registry/*/*.yaml — do not hand-edit.
